name: Idaho Workers' Comp Benefits for Construction Back Injuries

mainEntity.name: What benefits are covered under Idaho workers' comp for back injuries in construction?
mainEntity.text: What benefits are covered under Idaho workers' comp for back injuries in construction?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho workers' comp covers medical costs, temporary total disability (2/3 wage loss), permanent partial disability ratings, and vocational rehab for back injuries.

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho Code §72-228 sets TTD at 2/3 wages up to 72 weeks standard. Construction back strains common; get PPI rating post-MMI. Insurers undervalue; independent medical exams help. Boise firms like Just Work Comp can negotiate higher settlements for Nampa/Caldwell workers.
